source: Ollama library model tags checked on 2026-07-01.

profiles.title: Minimal CPU offline helper
best_for: offline fallback when internet is unavailable
profiles.notes: Small model profile for first offline checks. Validate answer quality on project prompts before production use.

profiles.title: Balanced multilingual helper
profiles.notes: Recommended first candidate for office workstations. Hardware estimate must be validated locally.

profiles.title: Stronger local reasoning
best_for: better reasoning quality on capable machines
profiles.notes: Slower than balanced profile, but useful for stronger offline assistant responses.

profiles.title: Larger workstation profile
profiles.notes: Use only after local RAM/GPU checks. Keep offline-docs as fallback for weak machines.
